title: FDIC Financial Report
description: Quarterly financial information for an FDIC-insured institution from the FDIC BankFind Suite API.

CERT.description: FDIC certificate number uniquely identifying the institution.

REPDTE.description: Report date for the quarterly financial data (YYYYMMDD format).

INTINC.description: Total interest income (in thousands of dollars).

EINTEXP.description: Total interest expense (in thousands of dollars).

NONII.description: Total noninterest income (in thousands of dollars).

NONIX.description: Total noninterest expense (in thousands of dollars).
